title: Jaguar in FULL PANIC - Leaked Memo- Employees Silenced!
description:
Jaguar in FULL PANIC - Leaked Memo- Employees Silenced! Jaguar’s latest rebrand has sparked massive controversy, ditching its iconic cars for bizarre marketing stunts. The Jaguar boss’s comments about critics, including Nigel Farage, have only fueled the backlash.Worse yet an internal memo leaded on Friday highlighting the chaos within and the tyranny leveled at employees over criticism and corporate solvency in the future. Is this the end of Jaguar as we know it? #jaguarcommercial #jaguar #JaguarControvery

Memo Source - M Guy Australia - @mguytv
